routes.name: metrics
routes.summary:
# HELP anixops_users_total Total number of users
# TYPE anixops_users_total gauge
anixops_users_total 0
# HELP anixops_n

routes.name: developer mode status
routes.manualNotes: Confirms internal developer mode is enabled and gated to admin JWT sessions.

routes.name: register
routes.manualNotes: Use dedicated auth flow tests when validating registration UX or rate-limit behavior.
routes.summary: Rate-limited by bootstrap users; inventory only

routes.name: refresh
routes.manualNotes: Current smoke run uses an invalid refresh token to verify boundary behavior.

routes.name: logout
routes.manualNotes: Validate token invalidation and session teardown in targeted auth regression tests.

routes.name: update current user
routes.manualNotes: Manual QA should verify partial profile updates and field validation.

routes.name: websocket handshake
routes.manualNotes: WebSocket upgrade is not suitable for a plain HTTP smoke request
routes.summary: WebSocket upgrade is not suitable for a plain HTTP smoke request
